# Rynix Studio

> Creative media effects that run entirely in your browser

## Overview
Rynix Studio is a browser-based creative tool for applying visual effects to images and videos. All processing runs on-device — no upload required.

## Routes
- / : Home and product overview
- /edit : Creative editor
- /terms : Terms of service
- /privacy : Privacy policy
- /pricing : Pricing
- /changelog : Product changelog

## Key features
- 30+ visual effects (ASCII, halftone, dithering, dot grids, and more)
- Image, video, and webcam input
- On-device processing with WebGL and Canvas
- Export to multiple formats
